verses.text: Sabbath ni khit, Nipi ni zingsang khua hong vak kuan ciangin Magdala khuami Mary leh adang Mary, daihawh dingin a va pai uh hi
Thakhatin zin nakpi takin hong ling hi. Topa' vantung mi khat, vantung panin hong paisuk a, han hukna suang a likkhiat khit ciangin a tungah a tu hi
Ama mel, khuaphialep tawh kibang a, a puan zong vuk bangin a pak hi
Hancingte in kihtalua uh ahih manin lingin a sibup uh hi
Ahi zongin tua vantung mi in numeite kiangah, “Lau kei un. Singlamteh tungah a kithat Jesuh a zong na hihlam uh ka thei hi
Hih lai-ah amah om nawnlo hi. A gensa bangin thokik khinta hi. Hong pai un la, amah a kisialna mun hong en un

Tu-in manlang takin va ciah un la, a nungzuite kiangah, ‘Sihna panin Jesuh kithosak khin a, Galilee gam note mai-ah a pai ding hi. Tua lai-ah amah na mu ding uh hi,’ ci-in va gen un. Hih ka hong gen thute hoihtakin ciamteh un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin numeite zong laukawm, nuamkawmin nungzuite kiangah hih thu a ko dingin a taipah uh hi
Jesuh in lampi-ah tua numeite na dawntuahin, “Lungnuam un!” ci-in a na hopih hi. Numeite in zong Jesuh a khe-ah lenin a bia uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei un. Pai un la, Galilee gamah ka sanggamte a paina dingin va gen un. Tua lai-ah kei hong mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tua bangin numeite a pai laitakin han a cing galkapte pawlkhat khuasungah hong ciah uh a, siampi liante kiangah a thupiang khempeuh a ko uh hi
Siampi liante in upate tawh thu kikupna khat nei-in vai a hawm khit uh ciangin sum tampi tawh galkapte golhguk uh a
“Mite kiangah, ‘A nungzuite, zanin ka ihmut kalun hong pai-in a luang a gukhia uh hi,’ ci-in gen un
Gam ukpa Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin ama lungkim zawhna ding dongin ka na genpih ding uh a, note-a' dingin bangmah lunghihmawhna omlo ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin galkapte in a sum sang uh a, a kisawl bangin a gamta uh hi. Tua ahih manin tuni dongin Jew mite lakah tu-a bangin hih thu a kigengen lai ahi hi.
Nungzui sawmlekhatte zong, Jesuh in a gensa bangin Galilee gama mualtungah a pai uh hi
Amaute in Jesuh a muh uh ciangin bia uh a, ahi zongin pawlkhat in umzo taktaklo uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute mai-ah Jesuh hong pai a, “Leitungah ahi a, vantungah ahi zongin vangliatna khempeuh kei tungah hong kipia khinta hi
Tua ahih ciangin note pai un la, midang khempeuh, keima nungzui mi suaksakin, Pa min, Tapa min, leh Kha Siangtho min tawh tui sungah na phum un
Tua ciangin note tungah ka hong gen thute khempeuh a zuihna dingun na hilh un. Hun bei dongin note a hong ompih tawntung ding ka hihna thu phawk ta un,” a ci hi.
